items.description: Stage 49 seed fixture — hosted child system
items.name: Conformance seed subsystem

items.description: ADR-055/056 must-exist-flip bake fixture. Declares one inline hosted component, so POST /systems emits a foreign-subject `child isHostedBy parent` edge (subject = the not-yet-existent child). Exercising this lane is what lets the harness prove foreign_edge_unclaimed_total reads zero BY CLAIMED (the registered NoBirthStub isHostedBy claim covers it), not zero by absence.
items.name: Conformance hosted platform (foreign-edge bake)

items.description: Minimal PhysicalSystem fixture used by the Stage 6 conformance harness. The Botts CS API ETS will POST this to the IUT once SensorML write paths land in the suite.
items.name: Conformance weather station
